Properties

IsBound

True ⇒ a bind owns this channel; the reconciler's static write must skip it.

public bool IsBound { get; }

Property Value

bool

Signal

The signal payload (bind wiring only).

public IReadSignal<T>? Signal { get; }

Property Value

IReadSignal<T>

Thunk

The thunk payload (bind wiring only — one type test per channel per mount).

public Func<T>? Thunk { get; }

Property Value

Func<T>

Value

The static value — meaningful only when IsBound is false (a bound Prop's value is the inert conversion seed).

public T Value { get; }

Property Value

T

Methods

FromSignal(IReadSignal<T>)

Bind from any concrete IReadSignal<T> implementation (used by sibling-declared operators like FloatSignal → Prop<float>, and by callers holding the interface).

public static Prop<T> FromSignal(IReadSignal<T> signal)

Parameters

signal IReadSignal<T>

Returns

Prop<T>

ValueOr(T)

The static value, or fallback when bound — for engine edge readers that need a scalar regardless (e.g. exit-animation seeds).

public T ValueOr(T fallback)

Parameters

fallback T

Returns

Prop<T>
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
